keyword: # NAMED-HOUSE keywords — a street line whose comma-segment is a NAMED property instead of a
# numbered address ("The Old Rectory" / "Whitfield Manor" / "Chalet Eugenia") is a classic
#   position=suffix : fires when the keyword is the LAST word of the segment (UK estates) —
#                     so "Manor Road" / "Hall Lane" can never fire.
#   position=prefix : fires when the keyword is the FIRST word (continental)
# Deliberately EXCLUDED as too common/ambiguous: HOUSE
# EDIT freely; keywords are matched case-insensitively after accent folding.
